examples: Remove the bouquet garni and stir in the parsley.
Remove the bouquet garni, taste and adjust salt, add a generous amount of freshly ground pepper and serve.
Although placed in Sarajevo city centre, Hotel Astra Garni is the oasis of the silence-comfort and good taste.
In this recipe, Mr. Stitt keeps the flavors balanced but adds extra taste by way of garlic and a bouquet garni.
